title: pycnanthemum incanum var. puberulum
intro: Pycnanthemum incanum var. puberulum, also known as downy mountain mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The plant's health benefits include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Downy mountain mint can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
